mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 200 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank tightening expectations, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 200 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and GDP (GDPC1) signals strong supply-side momentum, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the combined INDPRO-GDPC1 signal falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 5% indicates tight labor markets, increasing wage pressures and corporate costs, which suppress earnings growth and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 5% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) indicate improving demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of periods with rising HOUST despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in residential mortgage credit (RSAFS) below 350,000 million dollars signals reduced demand for housing, weakening related sectors and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS falls below 350,000 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL reflect inflationary monetary policy, raising real interest rates and depressing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the FEDFUNDS-CPIAUCSL interaction falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) during expansionary phases indicates robust supply-side capacity, supporting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of periods with rising INDPRO despite the signal.
